description: Robbie Shelstone discusses his experience in fundraising for films through Web3, focusing on his project 'Off Leash' and introducing his new animated universe 'Public'. He emphasizes the importance of creator ownership and fan engagement in the evolving entertainment landscape.
topic_summary: In this session, Robbie Shelstone shares insights on filmmaking in the Web3 space, detailing his journey with 'Off Leash' and unveiling 'Public', a character-driven animated universe that encourages fan participation and storytelling.
